calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Saam Takaloo, Esq., Tel. 424.239.3844, appearing for Defendant Bolt Financial, Inc.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT BOLT FINANCIAL, INC.'S Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint.

Mr. Takaloo stated that he was submitting on the tentative ruling.

At the conclusion of Mr. Takaloo's comment, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's unopposed "motion to seal portions of complaint" is granted.

Counsel for defendant is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Deputy: Not Present. (302/RBU)
